summary: PDF Viewer Modal feature testing complete - All 8 features verified. Backend 7/7 tests passed. Frontend all UI tests passed. Eye button now opens PDFViewerModal for in-app PDF/image viewing instead of triggering download.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test documents: PDF (52e87c23-ab92-4faf-a919-fc5b93720058), Image (eee6042c-2187-471c-92f2-5aafc8f5858c)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF viewer feature fully functional. react-pdf v10.4.1 with pdfjs-dist worker from unpkg CDN working correctly. PDFViewerModal component renders PDFs with page count, zoom controls (100% default), and page navigation. Images display as elements. Download button in modal triggers file download with success toast.

tested_features.eye_button_opens_pdf_viewer_modal: PASS - Clicking Eye icon on document tile opens PDFViewerModal with data-testid='pdf-viewer-modal'
tested_features.pdf_renders_with_react_pdf: PASS - PDF documents render correctly using react-pdf with page count (1 page), zoom controls (100%), and page navigation (1/1)
tested_features.image_renders_inline: PASS - Image documents render as element inside modal with correct alt text
tested_features.download_button_triggers_download: PASS - Download button in viewer modal triggers file download, shows 'Document downloaded' toast
tested_features.close_button_closes_modal: PASS - X button closes the viewer modal successfully
tested_features.non_previewable_fallback: PASS - Non-previewable file types (like text/plain) show toast and fallback to download
tested_features.vault_page_loads_correctly: PASS - Vault page loads with 'Secure Document Vault' header and 2 documents listed
tested_features.action_buttons_on_hover: PASS - Document cards show 4 action buttons (Eye, Download, Edit, Delete) on hover with opacity transition from 0 to 1

backend_tests.test_preview_pdf_document_success: PASS - GET /api/documents/{pdf_id}/preview returns 200 with PDF content
backend_tests.test_preview_image_document_success: PASS - GET /api/documents/{image_id}/preview returns 200 with image content
backend_tests.test_download_pdf_document_success: PASS - GET /api/documents/{pdf_id}/download returns 200 with attachment header
backend_tests.test_list_documents_success: PASS - GET /api/documents/{estate_id} returns documents with file_type field

ui_verification.pdf_modal_header: Shows document name and page count (e.g., 'Test PDF Viewer - 1 page')
ui_verification.pdf_controls: Zoom controls (-/+), zoom percentage (100%), page navigation (< 1/1 >)
ui_verification.modal_buttons: Download button with icon and Close (X) button
ui_verification.hover_behavior: Action buttons opacity transitions from 0 to 1 on card hover
ui_verification.download_toast: 'Document downloaded' success toast appears after download
